prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约29385→38571→41816→41098→41650，2021至2023年连续后移约12431名，2024年新高考改革后略有回升，2025年基本持平于41650名附近，近3年波动区间约41000–41800名，整体呈后移企稳态势；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年17人、2022年18人、2023年18人、2024年34人、2025年43人，2026年计划63人，较2025年扩招20人（增幅约46.5%），扩招幅度较大，将显著降低录取门槛，使最低位次数字明显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第114名，近年排名在113–120间波动，属于全国中上游水平，但非985，对高分考生吸引力有限；该校在声誉评价文件中2021–2026年均无显著正面或负面舆情记录；抖音热度总排名第101位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度平稳，无明显热度推高效应；第五轮学科评估中内蒙古大学无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力偏弱，对高分考生吸引力不足，报考热度主要依赖211身份和招生计划规模。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业社会热度平稳；广西物理类考生2021年约20.8万→2025年约26.0万→2026年估算约26.4万，考生规模持续小幅增长，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移企稳趋势、2026年物理类大幅扩招约46.5%以及本省物理类考生小幅增长等因素，扩招是主导因素，将显著拉低位次门槛。在2025年基准41650名基础上，按供需弹性计算，预测2026年最低位次约53072名，区间52572–53572名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 29385 → 38571 → 41816 → 41098 → 41650. From 2021 to 2023, there was a continuous decline of about 12431 places. After the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, there was a slight recovery, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable around 41650. In the past 3 years, the fluctuation range was about 41000–41800, showing an overall trend of declining and then stabilizing. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 17 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 34 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and 63 in 2026, an increase of 20 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 46.5%). This significant expansion will notably lower the admission threshold, causing the minimum ranking to increase substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 114th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 113 and 120, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally, but it is not a 985 university, so it has limited appeal to high-scoring students. In reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, there are no significant positive or negative public records. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with relatively low short video exposure, stable application attention, and no obvious popularity-boosting effect. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak overall disciplinary strength, insufficient appeal to high-scoring students, and application popularity mainly relying on its 211 status and enrollment plan scale.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related engineering majors is stable. The number of Guangxi Physics Category examinees was approximately 208,000 in 2021 → 260,000 in 2025 → estimated 264,000 in 2026, with a continuous slight increase in the examinee pool, leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of declining and then stabilizing rankings, the significant expansion of about 46.5% in Physics Category in 2026, and the slight increase in local Physics Category examinees, the expansion is the dominant factor and will significantly lower the ranking threshold. Based on the 2025 baseline of 41650, calculated using supply-demand elasticity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 53072, with a range of 52572–53572.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category expands significantly by about 46.5%, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 53072, range 52572–53572. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range should focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 52500) can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 53500) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.
